string.text: Order for ammunitions in the damage table, Dmg vs Stalkers stat, and Dmg vs Mutants stat.
Used by the damage table and Dmg stats. Matches live CQC range_factor.
Buckshot / multi-pellet ammo only. Slugs stay at 1 pellet; effective count never drops below 1.
Dispersion = lateral miss from standing Spread (min). Bullet Drop = vertical fall.
ADS camera climb angle used when counting consecutive shots for Burst Size.
Where to place new stats list rows
Hit Power / Dmg vs Stalkers / Dmg vs Mutants always lead unless End of list.

When comparing to the equipped weapon: put green/red on the left (main stat) or right (+/- difference). Applies to Dorn and vanilla rows without recalculating numbers. Slash damage rows keep their ammo colors either way.
Put weight just under the item name (left) and pull the description / STATUS block up to reclaim the empty padding. Applies to all item tooltips.
Under the weapon description: Type, AP, vs Torso Armor, vs Head Armor.
Header text only; does not change the damage math.
Armor tier names [Min, Lgt, Lgt+, Mid, ...]
Off assumes a perfect barrel (live WPO barrel part when on).
Damage table uses silencer boost when equipped
x1.07 on stalker damage/AP in the table (and AP color scale). Mutants never get this.
Off assumes a perfect barrel. Affects both Dmg stats.
Stat list uses silencer when equipped
Dmg vs Stalkers x1.07, Burst Size cam-recoil _k, and Bullet Drop muzzle-speed _k when a silencer is equipped. Does not change Barrel Wear. Mutants unaffected.
Lateral miss at the Dispersion/Drop range (range x tan standing Spread min).
Min - max cone degrees: standing-ADS - hip-run. Aiming mostly cancels the movement add-on.
Percent of base ammo damage this weapon deals. Useful for comparing guns that share ammo.
Pre-armor torso damage per ammo type.
Per ammo, before species modifiers. No silencer boost.
Vertical drop over the Dispersion/Drop range.
Per-shot chance the barrel itself loses 1% (e.g. 1.2% @ -1%). Separate from other-part dings. Silencers do not change this.
ADS shots at max fire rate until camera climb hits the Burst Size climb target (silencer recoil _k when equipped).

- Uses ballistic calculations from live CQC grok_bo / ammo (CQC loads above GBOOBS). 
- Assumed range is set by MCM (default 30m). For damage numbers, barrel condition is treated as 100% unless you toggle to use the live WPO barrel part. 
- Damage numbers also always factor in current difficulty and weapon hit power. 
- Silencers (when the matching MCM toggles are on): stalker damage/AP get CQC's x1.07; Burst Size uses cam-recoil _k; Bullet Drop uses muzzle-speed _k. Mutant damage never gets the x1.07. Other attachments, artifacts, medicines, etc. are ignored. 
- Ammo rows (damage table, Dmg vs Stalkers, and Dmg vs Mutants) default to the same order as the tooltip ammo icons. MCM can instead sort Dmg desc or AP desc.

New optional stat list items: 
 
%c[d_green]Spread%c[default] 
 - Min - max cone in degrees: standing-ADS (weapon fire_dispersion_base) - hip-fire while running (min + movement penalty). 
 - E.g. "0.35 - 1.20" means up to 0.35В° off center when still, up to 1.20В° while hip-running. 
 - Uses normal run speed, not sprint. Aiming mostly cancels the movement add-on (back to the min). 
 
%c[d_green]Dispersion%c[default] 
 - Standing Spread (min) angle translated into distance off target at the MCM Dispersion/Drop range (default 200m): range x tan(Spread min). 
 
%c[d_green]Hit Power%c[default] 
 - New stat that shows what % of base ammo damage this weapon inflicts. 
 - Useful for comparing weapons that use the same ammo types. 
 
%c[d_green]Dmg vs Stalkers%c[default] 
 - New stat for per-ammo torso damage vs stalkers (does not account for armor). 
 - Math: (hit_power / range_factor) x ammo_k_hit x torso_mult (0.9) x 1.1 x pellets x barrel_cond x difficulty x npc_ammo_mult x silencer (1.07 if equipped and stats silencer MCM on). 
 - pellets = buck_shot x (MCM Pellets assumed to hit % / 100), min 1; single-projectile ammo stays 1. 
 - Per-ammo values are colored like the damage-table Type labels. 
 
%c[d_green]Dmg vs Mutants%c[default] 
 - New stat for per-ammo damage vs mutants (before mutant specific modifiers). 
 - Math: (hit_power / range_factor) x ammo_k_hit x pellets x mut_mult (0.85) x mut_ammo_mult x barrel_cond x difficulty (no silencer; matches CQC). 
 - pellets = buck_shot x (MCM Pellets assumed to hit % / 100), min 1; single-projectile ammo stays 1. 
 - Per-ammo values are colored like the damage-table Type labels. 
 
%c[d_green]Bullet Drop%c[default] 
 - How far a bullet drops over the MCM Dispersion/Drop range (default 200m; slider 100-2000). 
 - With Stat List silencer MCM on and a silencer attached: multiplies muzzle velocity by bullet_speed_k (Boomsticks cans are often ~0.9; some lower), so drop increases with a suppressor. 
 
%c[d_green]Barrel Wear%c[default] 
 - Per-shot chance that the barrel specifically loses 1% (shown as e.g. 1.2% @ -1%). 
 - Independent of other parts: WPO also rolls a separate (higher) chance to ding a random non-barrel part. Barrel chance is not shared or divided by part count. 
 - Math: (weapon_degradation x condition_shot_dec x 15000) / 10 percent. 
 - weapon_degradation by economy: Tourist 0.5, Scavenger 0.75, Survivalist 1.0. Silencers do not change this. 
 
%c[d_green]Burst Size%c[default] 
 - How many consecutive ADS shots (at max fire rate) it takes for the camera to climb to the MCM Burst Size climb target (default 3 degrees; slider 1-10, step 0.5). 
 - With Stat List silencer MCM on and a silencer attached: multiplies ADS cam kick by zoom_cam_dispersion_k (and inc _k when present), so Burst Size goes up when the suppressor softens recoil.

A table showing how much damage this weapon does with each ammo type vs different body parts and armor values. 
(see Useful Info for torso/head armor floats and example outfits) 
 
%c[d_green]Columns%c[default]: 
 - %c[d_blue]Type%c[default]: Ammo type used for damage calculations on this row (colored by ammo class: FMJ yellow, HP/BUCK teal, AP orange, etc.). Row order defaults to the tooltip ammo icons order (MCM can sort by Dmg or AP instead). 
 - %c[d_blue]AP%c[default]: Armor penetration colored %c[dark_gray]grey%c[default] -> that row's ammo Type color by how well it punches through the listed armor values. 
 - %c[d_blue]vs Torso Armor%c[default]: Damage for a given ammo vs a real torso armor value. Damage colored %c[dark_gray]grey%c[default] -> %c[d_green]green%c[default] for how close the value is to max damage for this weapon/ammo/bone. 
 - %c[d_blue]vs Head Armor%c[default]: Same as %c[d_blue]vs Torso Armor%c[default], but vs real head armor values, and with the x3.65 headshot damage mult factored in. 
 
%c[d_green]Table notes%c[default]: 
 - Damage numbers are mainly a reflection of your opening salvo, as once an armor segment (head/torso+arms/legs) is broken, you will do near-full damage to that segment regardless of AP. 
 - Shows up to 4 ammo rows; if a weapon has more, the title shows DAMAGE (+N) for the omitted count (full list still appears in the Dmg stats). 
 - Column headers can show short armor-class names (Min/Lgt/...), the raw bone-armor floats used in the math, or those floats x100 floored to integers (e.g. 0.075 -> 7). 
 - avg_hit_fraction uses the average hit_fraction for profiles at that exact armor value only. 
 - Full armor-value list (including rare tiers skipped in the table) is under Useful Info section. 
 
%c[d_green]Math%c[default] (live CQC grok_bo): 
 - %c[d_blue]range_factor%c[default] = 1 + (range / 200) x k_air x 0.5 / (1 - k_air + 0.1) 
 - %c[d_blue]bone_mult%c[default] = 0.9 (torso) / 3.65 (head) 
 - %c[d_blue]silencer%c[default] = 1.07 if the section's MCM silencer toggle is on and a silencer is attached (or integrated); else 1 
 - %c[d_blue]pellets%c[default] = buck_shot x (MCM Pellets assumed to hit % / 100), min 1; single-projectile ammo stays 1 (default 100%) 
 - %c[d_blue]power%c[default] = (hit_power / %c[d_blue]range_factor%c[default]) x ammo_k_hit x %c[d_blue]bone_mult%c[default] x tier_ap_scale x 1.1 x %c[d_blue]pellets%c[default] x barrel_cond x difficulty x npc_ammo_mult x %c[d_blue]silencer%c[default] x 100 
 - %c[d_blue]combat_ap%c[default] = ((k_ap + sniper_bonus) x 10) x tier_ap_scale x barrel_cond / range_factor x 0.80 x difficulty x %c[d_blue]silencer%c[default] 
 - %c[d_blue]sniper_bonus%c[default] = 0.05 for CQC sniper parent sections (L96, SV-98, Mosin, Rem 700, DVL, вЂ¦); else 0. AP column still shows ammo-card k_ap x 1000. 
 - %c[d_blue]hp_ammo_mult%c[default] = 1 except for specific ammos which can be up to 10. Higher = worse damage (see hp_ammo_mult section below). 
 - IF %c[d_blue]combat_ap%c[default] >= armor OR armor is 0 THEN %c[d_red]damage%c[default] = %c[d_blue]power%c[default] 
 - ELSE IF %c[d_blue]combat_ap%c[default] > armor / 1.6 THEN %c[d_red]damage%c[default] = %c[d_blue]power%c[default] x avg_hit_fraction 
 - ELSE %c[d_red]damage%c[default] = 0.0025 x %c[d_blue]power%c[default] x avg_hit_fraction x 62.5 / %c[d_blue]hp_ammo_mult%c[default] 
 - AP column shows ini k_ap x 1000 (same as the ammo info card); combat uses k_ap x 10.

%c[d_green]NPC armor%c[default] comes from the visual model they are wearing (the outfit you see on them), not from whatever armor item they happen to drop. 
 - Loot and appearance usually roughly match (i.e. exo NPCs usually drop exo armor), but many models with higher protection drop armors that are very difficult. 
 
%c[d_green]NPC bone_mult%c[default]: 
 Damage is multiplied according to where the hit lands on an NPC (CQC stalker_damage). 
 - %c[d_blue]Head%c[default]: 365% 
 - %c[d_blue]Jaw%c[default]: 300% 
 - %c[d_blue]Neck%c[default]: 270% 
 - %c[d_blue]Torso%c[default]: 90% 
 - %c[d_blue]Upper arms%c[default]: 70% 
 - %c[d_blue]Forearms%c[default]: 60% 
 - %c[d_blue]Thighs%c[default]: 55% 
 - %c[d_blue]Calves%c[default]: 45% 
 - %c[d_blue]Hands%c[default]: 40% 
 - %c[d_blue]Feet%c[default]: 30% 
 - %c[d_blue]Default fallback for unmapped bones%c[default]: 75% 
 
%c[d_green]NPC bone armor%c[default] is tied to their rendered model (86 unique models). 
 - %c[orange]Min damage%c[default] = is just %c[orange]avg_hit_fraction%c[default] as a % of the damage that still applies on a failed pen. 
 - %c[d_blue]Tier%c[default] = What this tier is called in the damage table (n/a means not shown). 
 - Model count = number of models with that armor value (ignoring some that are unused). 
 - Appearances = are example loot outfits that tend to sit in that bone-armor bucket (exact GAMMA DB names; not every NPC look). 
 
%c[d_green]Torso armors%c[default] in base GAMMA 
 | %c[d_blue]Tier%c[default] | %c[red]armor%c[default] x model count | %c[orange]Min damage%c[default] | %c[yellow]% of all ammos that pen%c[default] | appearances (partial, to help visualize) | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
 | %c[d_blue]Min%c[default] | %c[red]0.011%c[default] x9 | %c[orange]85%c[default]% | %c[yellow]100%c[default]% | Leather Jacket, Black Leather Jacket, Heavy Brown Overcoat, Overcoat | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lgt%c[default] | %c[red]0.075%c[default] x6 | %c[orange]60%c[default]% | %c[yellow]80%c[default]% | Military Service Outfit, SSP-99 Bodysuit, Monolith X-18 Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lgt+%c[default] | %c[red]0.100%c[default] x8 | %c[orange]50%c[default]% | %c[yellow]70%c[default]% | "Sunrise" Stalker Suit, CS-1 Body Armor, Wind of Freedom | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[red]0.125%c[default] x1 | %c[orange]40%c[default]% | %c[yellow]65%c[default]% | CS-2a Body Armor | 
 | %c[d_blue]Mid%c[default] | %c[red]0.150%c[default] x24 | %c[orange]48%c[default]% | %c[yellow]60%c[default]% | SEVA Bodysuit, Tactical Stalker Suit, Mercenary LC Suit, Sentinel of Freedom | 
 | %c[d_blue]Mid+%c[default] | %c[red]0.200%c[default] x13 | %c[orange]37%c[default]% | %c[yellow]35%c[default]% | Berill-5M Armored Suit, CS-3a Body Armor, Guardian of Freedom, "Sunrise" Exoskeleton | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy%c[default] | %c[red]0.250%c[default] x10 | %c[orange]30%c[default]% | %c[yellow]25%c[default]% | Interceptor Body Armor, Skat-9 Armored Suit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[red]0.300%c[default] x1 | %c[orange]30%c[default]% | %c[yellow]20%c[default]% | Exosuit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[red]0.350%c[default] x2 | %c[orange]22%c[default]% | %c[yellow]10%c[default]% | Skat-9 Armored Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy+%c[default] | %c[red]0.400%c[default] x4 | %c[orange]20%c[default]% | %c[yellow]10%c[default]% | PSZ-7p Shell Armor, Mercenary Exosuit, Monolith Exosuit | 
 | %c[d_grey]n/a%c[default] | %c[red]0.430%c[default] x1 | %c[orange]15%c[default]% | %c[yellow]10%c[default]% | Paragon of Freedom | 
 | %c[d_blue]Exo%c[default] | %c[red]0.550%c[default] x5 | %c[orange]15%c[default]% | %c[yellow]5%c[default]% | Exoskeleton, Mercenary Exoskeleton, Monolith Exoskeleton | 
 | %c[d_blue]Max%c[default] | %c[red]0.650%c[default] x2 | %c[orange]15%c[default]% | %c[yellow]5%c[default]% | Military Stalker Nosorog, PSZ-10d Exoskeleton | 
 
%c[d_green]Head armors%c[default] in base GAMMA 
 | %c[d_blue]Tier%c[default] | %c[red]armor%c[default] x model count | %c[orange]Min damage%c[default] | %c[yellow]% of all ammos that pen%c[default] | appearances (partial, to help visualize) | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
 | %c[d_blue]Min%c[default] | %c[red]0.000%c[default] x39 | %c[grey]100%c[default] | %c[yellow]100%c[default]% | Overcoat, Leather Jacket, Tactical Stalker Suit, "Sunrise" Exoskeleton | 
 | %c[d_blue]Lgt%c[default] | %c[red]0.150%c[default] x7 | %c[orange]41%c[default]% | %c[yellow]55%c[default]% | SEVA Bodysuit, SSP-99 Bodysuit, PS5-9Md Universal Scientific Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Mid%c[default] | %c[red]0.200%c[default] x13 | %c[orange]44%c[default]% | %c[yellow]40%c[default]% | CS-3a Body Armor, Mercenary LC Suit, Berill-5M Armored Suit, "Sunrise" Stalker Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Hvy%c[default] | %c[red]0.300%c[default] x26 | %c[orange]33%c[default]% | %c[yellow]20%c[default]% | Exosuit, Exoskeleton, PSZ-7p Shell Armor, Skat-9 Armored Suit | 
 | %c[d_blue]Max%c[default] | %c[red]0.350%c[default] x1 | %c[orange]15%c[default]% | %c[yellow]10%c[default]% | Military Stalker Nosorog | 
 
%c[d_green]NPC health%c[default] is one shared pool (not split across limbs). 
 - Every stalker has the same max HP. 
 - There are no faction damage resists in live grok_bo. 
 
%c[d_green]mut_mult%c[default] Mutant multiplier (species_mult / weak_spot_mult): 
 - %c[d_blue]Fracture%c[default]: 0.60 / 2.2 
 - %c[d_blue]Chimera%c[default]: 0.75 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Zombie%c[default]: 0.80 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Pseudogiant%c[default]: 0.85 / 2.0 
 - %c[d_blue]Bloodsucker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.4 
 - %c[d_blue]Psysucker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.6 
 - %c[d_blue]Lurker%c[default]: 0.85 / 1.5 
 - %c[d_blue]Boar%c[default]: 0.95 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Flesh%c[default]: 0.95 / 1.3 
 - %c[d_blue]Dog%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Pseudodog%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Cat%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Burer%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Controller%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Poltergeist%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Tushkano%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Crow%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Rat%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Karlik%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Bibliotekar%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Rotan%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Borya%c[default]: 1.0 / none 
 - %c[d_blue]Snork%c[default]: 1.10 / 2.0 
 
%c[d_green]mut_ammo_mult%c[default] Mutant ammo damage multiplier: 
 - 1.75: 7.62x25 LRNPC / P 
 - 1.0: 23x75 shrapnel / barrikada, 12x76 zhekan, 9x19 PBP, 9x18 PMM, 5.45 EP, 5.56 SS190, 7.62x25 Pst, .357 Magnum HP, .45 Hydro / FMJ 
 - 0.90: Buckshot 12x70 / 20x70 
 - 0.85: Everything else 
 
%c[d_green]hp_ammo_mult%c[default] Hard-fail residual divisor (CQC hp_rounds; stalker armor only): 
 Divides residual damage when combat_ap is too low to soft-pen after one armor chip. Soft pens and full pens ignore this. Higher = worse non-pen chip damage. 
 - 10: .338 Federal 
 - 3.5: 12x76 Zhekan, 23x75 Barrikada 
 - 3: Buckshot 12x70 
 - 2.7: .45 Hydro 
 - 2: .357 Magnum HP, 9x18 PMM, 9x19 PBP, 23x75 Shrapnel, Buckshot 20x70 
 - 1.75: 7.62x25 P 
 - 1.5: 12x76 Dart 
 - 1.45: 5.45 EP 
 - 1.33: 5.56 SS190 
 - 1.0: Everything else (FMJ / AP / Pst / вЂ¦) 
 
%c[d_green]Silencers%c[default]: 
 - Live CQC multiplies stalker combat damage and AP x1.07 when a silencer is attached (or the weapon has an integrated suppressor). 
 - Damage Table and Stat List each have their own MCM toggle (both off by default). Table toggle affects the damage table and AP color scale; stats toggle affects Dmg vs Stalkers, Burst Size recoil _k, and Bullet Drop muzzle-speed _k. 
 - Dmg vs Mutants does not get the silencer boost (matches live CQC). 
 - Recoil: silencers usually set cam_dispersion_k / zoom_cam_dispersion_k around 0.82 (softer kick). Burst Size uses those when the stats silencer toggle is on. 
 - Velocity: Boomsticks silencers set bullet_speed_k (often ~0.9; some cans 0.7-0.85). Bullet Drop uses that when the stats silencer toggle is on. 
 - Wear: silencers do not affect barrel wear. 
 
%c[d_green]Overall weapon condition%c[default]: 
 - GAMMA locks overall weapon condition to about 83% so that it is always under WPO barrel-wear threshold (85%), so the per-shot barrel wear chance is always in play.
